# Claude-Adrien Helvétius

*1715 – 1771 · French · [The Enlightenment](../movements/enlightenment.md)*

French materialist philosopher of the [Enlightenment](../movements/enlightenment.md), advocate of a radical sensationism for whom education and environment make almost the whole of man.
